phases.name: audit
steps: scan app factory builds for React Native streak apps
identify which already have manual logging (fitness, running, pushup, plank, yoga, water, breathwork)
check if agencyenterprise/react-native-health already wired (prior integration)

phases.name: template_injection
steps: create src/lib/healthkit.ts hook (useHealthKitData) with graceful fallback to manual input
add NSHealthShareUsageDescription + NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription to Info.plist template
wire HKQuantityTypeIdentifierStepCount, HKWorkoutType, HKQuantityTypeIdentifierActiveEnergyBurned to streak logic

phases.name: aso_update
steps: add 'Apple Health' + 'HealthKit sync' + 'auto-tracking' to App Store keyword bank
update screenshots brief: show Health app badge + auto-synced streak
update app descriptions in app factory builds to mention auto-tracking
